case_title: MEG ANDREWS VS. HANNA BAJALIEH et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-13-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-13-2010 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: ELIZABETH RILES. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CO-DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ANDREWS, MEG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAJALIEH, HANNA $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,500.00, DEFENDANT PAUL RIVETTE IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT HANNA BAJALIEH SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER (SC-108) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ANDREWS, MEG
ORDER ON (SC-108)REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT (SMALL CLAIMS). THE REQUEST IS DENIED. -PRO TEM: ELIZABETH L. RILES-
